summary: Completed PLAN-20260706-0001 in commit c6f09f0. Added VERIFY-20260706-0001 and WARR-20260706-0002, marked PLAN-20260706-0001 completed, rebuilt SELF_MODEL.json, and updated self-model tests. Completion certifies the read-only context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics slice only. It does not claim provider prompt changes, context selection changes, or automatic L0 retrieval behavior. Recovery fixed the verification recorded_by schema by reusing the existing object-shaped recorded_by pattern. Self-model tests passed with 40 tests, full suite passed with 319 tests, and post-commit self-model index audit returned ok true.
